subject: Re: import particleseries data
body:
Hi Mingyu,
You haven’t given us enough information here and the workflow you describe works fine in the tutorial - is there something different about your data compared to the tutorial? What errors are you getting?
Cheers,
Alister
Sent from mobile - apologies for brevity
On Sep 16, 2024, at 18:08, Mingyu Jung <jmg0910@snu.ac.kr> wrote:
﻿Hi all,
I got particleseries data from M and refine in relion. When I tried to re-import this particleseries data to M, M couldn't recognize the particles and star files.Is there any ways to import particleseries data to M?
Thanks!
Best,
Mingyu
